item.title: 「妖夢と紫陽花と幽々子さま」 （Youmu, Hydrangeas,YuYuko） 前回upしたモノクロイラストを背景や…
item.author: 秋ゆゆと@イラスト (@akiyuyu1.bsky.social)
item.description:
「妖夢と紫陽花と幽々子さま」
（Youmu, Hydrangeas,YuYuko）
前回upしたモノクロイラストを背景やキャラを加えてカラー化しました🎨
塗りが難しくて勉強しなきゃ行けないと感じました。でも頑張った😂
#東方　#東方Project #魂魄妖夢　#幽々子　#西行寺幽々子　#イラスト　#紫陽花　#妖夢　#Touhou #Youmu #Yuyuko
item.content:encoded:
「妖夢と紫陽花と幽々子さま」
（Youmu, Hydrangeas,YuYuko）
前回upしたモノクロイラストを背景やキャラを加えてカラー化しました🎨
塗りが難しくて勉強しなきゃ行けないと感じました。でも頑張った😂
#東方　#東方Project #魂魄妖夢　#幽々子　#西行寺幽々子　#イラスト　#紫陽花　#妖夢　#Touhou #Youmu #Yuyuko

item.title: 「半年以内に値上げ」経営者6割 原油・ナフサ不安、調達先見直しも - 日本経済新聞 www.nikkei.com/art…
item.author: 地平社 (@chiheisha.bsky.social)
item.description:
「半年以内に値上げ」経営者6割　原油・ナフサ不安、調達先見直しも - 日本経済新聞 www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZ...

「今回のリスクは地産地消やサーキュラーエコノミー（循環型経済）の実現を加速するかもしれない。これまで進めてきた様々な施策をさらに加速させることが経営の重要課題になる」
item.content:encoded:
「半年以内に値上げ」経営者6割　原油・ナフサ不安、調達先見直しも - 日本経済新聞 www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZ...

「今回のリスクは地産地消やサーキュラーエコノミー（循環型経済）の実現を加速するかもしれない。これまで進めてきた様々な施策をさらに加速させることが経営の重要課題になる」

item.title: #今月描いた絵を晒そう #illustration おはちんです(/・ω・)/✨ 6月も最後だと…！？ 来月渡すため…
item.author: ちん(りのちん) (@s929100nosuke.bsky.social)
item.description:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう　#illustration　
おはちんです(/・ω・)/✨
6月も最後だと…！？

来月渡すためのプレゼント絵があってここにまだ載せられないのがあります～(੭ु´･ω･`)੭ु⁾⁾ﾓﾀﾞﾓﾀﾞ
とゆことで毎月大体ペース一緒…ｗ
はぶぁないすで～🌱
item.content:encoded:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう　#illustration　
おはちんです(/・ω・)/✨
6月も最後だと…！？

来月渡すためのプレゼント絵があってここにまだ載せられないのがあります～(੭ु´･ω･`)੭ु⁾⁾ﾓﾀﾞﾓﾀﾞ
とゆことで毎月大体ペース一緒…ｗ
はぶぁないすで～🌱

item.title: A Japanese fan broke down crying after his country's elimina…
item.author: Dr. Lucky Tran (@luckytran.com)
item.description:
A Japanese fan broke down crying after his country's elimination, but a group of Brazilians fans went to console him and Mexican fans made him soar. You gotta love the World Cup! ❤️🌎⚽️

Video: RÉCORD
item.content:encoded:
A Japanese fan broke down crying after his country's elimination, but a group of Brazilians fans went to console him and Mexican fans made him soar. You gotta love the World Cup! ❤️🌎⚽️

Video: RÉCORD

item.title: Australia's ACCC sues Amazon for allegedly introducing ads t…
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:
Australia's ACCC sues Amazon for allegedly introducing ads to Prime Video under unfair contract terms and forcing existing subscribers to pay more to avoid them (Peter Vercoe/Bloomberg)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Australia's ACCC sues Amazon for allegedly introducing ads to Prime Video under unfair contract terms and forcing existing subscribers to pay more to avoid them (Peter Vercoe/Bloomberg)

item.title: 【『地平』7月号】new!! ［張栄恭・国民党副主席に聞く］ 「台湾有事」危機解決のキーワードは何か 聞き手＝本田善彦…
item.author: 地平社 (@chiheisha.bsky.social)
item.description:
【『地平』7月号】new!!
［張栄恭・国民党副主席に聞く］
「台湾有事」危機解決のキーワードは何か

聞き手＝本田善彦・早田健文
chihei.net?p=7870
ーー
台湾の国民党主席の鄭麗文氏は2026年4月7～12日、中国大陸を訪問し、中国共産党の習近平総書記と会見した。国民党と共産党のトップ会談は10年近く行なわれておらず、会談は国際的に注目された。

この訪問に随行した国民党副主席の張栄恭氏は、訪問実現の立役者でもある。その張栄恭氏に、国民党の対中国大陸政策について話を聞いた。
item.content:encoded:
【『地平』7月号】new!!
［張栄恭・国民党副主席に聞く］
「台湾有事」危機解決のキーワードは何か

聞き手＝本田善彦・早田健文
chihei.net?p=7870
ーー
台湾の国民党主席の鄭麗文氏は2026年4月7～12日、中国大陸を訪問し、中国共産党の習近平総書記と会見した。国民党と共産党のトップ会談は10年近く行なわれておらず、会談は国際的に注目された。

この訪問に随行した国民党副主席の張栄恭氏は、訪問実現の立役者でもある。その張栄恭氏に、国民党の対中国大陸政策について話を聞いた。

item.title: Wow, that was truly amazing, the Strawberry Full Moon rising…
item.author: Veronica in the Fens ~ My Heart in Nature (@veronicainthefens.bsky.social)
item.description:
Wow, that was truly amazing, the Strawberry Full Moon rising over Ely Cathedral this evening. Seen from Little Downham outside of Ely, Cambridgeshire 😍🌝
I didn’t think it was going to shine through the clouds, but it certainly did 🙏🏻🥰
#Fullmoon #strawberrymoon #ElyCathedral #amazing #Wonderful
item.content:encoded:
Wow, that was truly amazing, the Strawberry Full Moon rising over Ely Cathedral this evening. Seen from Little Downham outside of Ely, Cambridgeshire 😍🌝
I didn’t think it was going to shine through the clouds, but it certainly did 🙏🏻🥰
#Fullmoon #strawberrymoon #ElyCathedral #amazing #Wonderful

item.title: @ismua.bsky.social A huge thank you for another fun challen…
item.author: Papillon Doré (@papillondore20.bsky.social)
item.description:
@ismua.bsky.social
A huge thank you for another fun challenge. I loved every minute of it, even though it was tough at times. I learned so much and I'm really looking forward to the next one. Thank you for being an amazing host and for everything you do for us each day. Thanks for the GIFs too!
❤️
item.content:encoded:
@ismua.bsky.social
A huge thank you for another fun challenge. I loved every minute of it, even though it was tough at times. I learned so much and I'm really looking forward to the next one. Thank you for being an amazing host and for everything you do for us each day. Thanks for the GIFs too!
❤️

item.title: 猫をモフったら夫と仲良くなっていく…無愛想なワケあり王弟と猫好き妻の恋物語 「君を愛することはできないと言われたの…
item.author: コミックナタリー (@comic.natalie.mu)
item.description:
猫をモフったら夫と仲良くなっていく…無愛想なワケあり王弟と猫好き妻の恋物語

「君を愛することはできないと言われたので猫を愛でることにしました 黒猫さんをもふもふしていたら、あら？ 旦那様のご様子が…？」1巻発売
▼試し読みあり
https://natalie.mu/comic/news/678302?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social
item.content:encoded:
猫をモフったら夫と仲良くなっていく…無愛想なワケあり王弟と猫好き妻の恋物語

「君を愛することはできないと言われたので猫を愛でることにしました 黒猫さんをもふもふしていたら、あら？ 旦那様のご様子が…？」1巻発売

item.title: 今月は3枚。雨の日は帰宅時刻が遅い上に寝る時刻も早くなるなど、とにかく絵を描く余裕がなかった。あと、文章の習作を書く時間…
item.author: 春摘怜 (@harutsumiren.bsky.social)
item.description:
今月は3枚。雨の日は帰宅時刻が遅い上に寝る時刻も早くなるなど、とにかく絵を描く余裕がなかった。あと、文章の習作を書く時間の方を多く取ったところもあったりして。
#今月描いた絵を晒そう
item.content:encoded:
今月は3枚。雨の日は帰宅時刻が遅い上に寝る時刻も早くなるなど、とにかく絵を描く余裕がなかった。あと、文章の習作を書く時間の方を多く取ったところもあったりして。
#今月描いた絵を晒そう

item.title: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naru…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naruto! ngl Naruto was such an awesome anime 🥹 it was filled with a ton of cool fight scenes, and it also had some comfy moments too 😊 it's one of my childhood favorites! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naruto! ngl Naruto was such an awesome anime 🥹 it was filled with a ton of cool fight scenes, and it also had some comfy moments too 😊 it's one of my childhood favorites! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: NEW: Former Louisiana death row inmate Jimmie “Chris” Duncan…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: Former Louisiana death row inmate Jimmie “Chris” Duncan, convicted based in part on forensic evidence now widely regarded as junk science, is officially a free man.

“I am flooded with relief,” one of his lawyers said.
item.content:encoded:
NEW: Former Louisiana death row inmate Jimmie “Chris” Duncan, convicted based in part on forensic evidence now widely regarded as junk science, is officially a free man.

“I am flooded with relief,” one of his lawyers said.

item.title: HAPPENING SOON: What’s next for Meta after tapping Indian fi…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
HAPPENING SOON: What’s next for Meta after tapping Indian fintech startup founder Kunal Shah as its new leader for WhatsApp?

Bloomberg reporters answer your questions in a Live Q&A on June 30 at 8 a.m. IST, 10:30 a.m. HKT / June 29 at 10:30 p.m. ET ⤵️
item.content:encoded:
HAPPENING SOON: What’s next for Meta after tapping Indian fintech startup founder Kunal Shah as its new leader for WhatsApp?

Bloomberg reporters answer your questions in a Live Q&A on June 30 at 8 a.m. IST, 10:30 a.m. HKT / June 29 at 10:30 p.m. ET ⤵️

item.content:encoded: New & Notable: Two giants of experimental music join forces on this mammoth LP full of expansive, immersive drones.

item.title: NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the federal government owes tribes water, but Native American communities in northern Arizona are still fighting for their rights to the Colorado River.

With @kjzz.org
item.content:encoded:
NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the federal government owes tribes water, but Native American communities in northern Arizona are still fighting for their rights to the Colorado River.

With @kjzz.org

item.title: Very probably the best photo I've ever taken of a 16th Centu…
item.author: Tom Cox (@dj-acid-reflux.bsky.social)
item.description: Very probably the best photo I've ever taken of a 16th Century dovecote with a cow standing in front of it, surrounded by buttercups, looking like she has just dropped a debut album she is thoroughly proud of.
item.content:encoded: Very probably the best photo I've ever taken of a 16th Century dovecote with a cow standing in front of it, surrounded by buttercups, looking like she has just dropped a debut album she is thoroughly proud of.

item.title: Lake Superior covers about 82,100 square kilometers or 31,69…
item.author: Luca (@lucagalletti.bsky.social)
item.description: Lake Superior covers about 82,100 square kilometers or 31,699 square miles, making it the largest freshwater lake by area in the world. 🇨🇦🇺🇸
item.content:encoded: Lake Superior covers about 82,100 square kilometers or 31,699 square miles, making it the largest freshwater lake by area in the world. 🇨🇦🇺🇸

item.title: Xbox's unionized workers have joined forces across teams to …
item.author: Kotaku (@kotaku.com)
item.description: Xbox's unionized workers have joined forces across teams to speak out and fight back against looming layoffs, demanding protections not just for union members, but for all Xbox workers. https://kotaku.com/unionized-workers-xbox-respond-layoff-reports-will-not-be-treated-disposable-2000711455
item.content:encoded: Xbox's unionized workers have joined forces across teams to speak out and fight back against looming layoffs, demanding protections not just for union members, but for all Xbox workers. https://kotaku.com/unionized-workers-xbox-respond-layoff-reports-will-not-be-treated-disposable-2000711455
